description: CHANGES_REQUESTED review with no inline threads and an in-progress CI check. Demonstrates fix for #223: routes to fix_code (not escalate) with --dismiss-review-ids. Also shows in-progress runs are listed because changesRequestedReviews is code-shaped work.

changesRequestedReviews.author: architect
changesRequestedReviews.body: The overall design needs to be reconsidered. Please see my comments in the review summary above.
